title: Close out summer classes
note: Classes page → Cancel Class on anything summer-only. Auto-stops recurring tuition charges + clears the waitlist. Leave anything running into fall alone.

title: Build the fall schedule
note: Classes page → Add Class for each fall class (day/time/instructor/max size — caps are enforced). Then Payments page → one recurring charge per class (amount, category 'tuition', day it bills). Safe to set up early — won't charge anyone until the first real due date after creation.

title: Open registration
note: Enrollment page → flip 'Registration open,' then share the link (attenddance.fly.dev/register). Returning families use the same link — system matches by email, no duplicates, auto re-enrolls existing dancers.

title: Approve registrations as they come in
note: Enrollment page shows a badge when new ones arrive. Approving creates the family + enrolls the kids. Flags 'Returning' on matches to an existing family.

title: Set up parent portal access
note: On a dancer's page → 'Portal Access' card. Generate invite codes for new parents. Locked-out parent? Make them a reset link right there — texts to them, expires in an hour.

title: First week: check-in on tablet
note: Take Attendance page, tablet or laptop — teachers have access. RFID readers do NOT work with this system — don't plug in the old Pi setup. Card-tap is buildable later if wanted.

title: First billing cycle
note: Tuition posts automatically on each class's due date. Mid-month joiners are NOT auto-charged that partial month — post it manually from the Payments page.

title: Send Thomas the Gmail app password
note: Unlocks auto-sending receipts/reminders/blasts. Last thing blocking email.
